title: Algerian Potato Tagine
description: A hearty and comforting Algerian-inspired stew made with tender potatoes and a rich creamy sauce.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the potatoes, tagine seasoning, and Algerian spice blend. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender.
Stir in the heavy cream and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
